title: Word Formation: Learning a Foreign Language

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
Learning to speak another language is a skill that almost anyone can master. The 1.1. _________ to communicate in English or Spanish opens up a whole new world of friends, books and films. Yet progress takes time, and above all it takes 1.2. _________, because nobody becomes fluent overnight.

One of the secrets is to keep speaking, even when you are afraid of getting things wrong. Every short conversation helps to build the 1.3. _________ you need. Do not worry about saying every word 1.4. _________ at first; teachers agree that making errors is simply part of learning.

Finding the right materials helps too. A good app or a friendly teacher can be extremely 1.5. _________. The most 1.6. _________ students are usually those who practise a little every day. Slowly, their 1.7. _________ of grammar and vocabulary grows, until one day they realise they can follow a whole film. Few experiences are as 1.8. _________ as that.
